metaData.Key Information: Dodomu's Soft Eva Slipper is the perfect blend of quality and sustainability. Made from high-quality and eco-friendly EVA materials, these slippers are non-slip, non-toxic, anti-aging, and easy to clean. The soft and comfortable feeling they provide helps to relax the stress on your feet, and they are super lightweight, making them ideal for household wear and travel. They are suitable for a wide range of settings, including the shower, bedroom, bathroom, living room, spa, gym, camps, hospital, swimming pool, beach, and leisure activities. Products advertised is in size 42-43, with a feet length of 24.0 cm - 24.5 cm and a deep blue color. It is important to note that these slippers run small, and customers are advised to choose two sizes bigger if they have wider or chubby feet.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place
